# Rust Development

Use this power to implement, review, debug, document, and research Rust code.

## Capabilities

- Idiomatic Rust implementation and API design
- Systematic root-cause debugging
- Rustdoc and public-contract review
- Cargo crate and Rust release research
- Repository-aware coding standards
- Evidence-based unsafe-code review

- `skills/rust-development/SKILL.md` - Core implementation and review guidance
